# [PHASE 7] Frontend - Student Portal

## Phase Overview
- **Phase Number**: 7
- **Phase Title**: Student Panel
- **Estimated Duration**: Week 7-8
- **Dependencies**: Phase 5 Complete, Academics Backend
- **Estimated Hours**: 20

## Task Description
Create student portal interface

## Detailed Requirements
- [ ] Student layout with sidebar navigation
- [ ] Dashboard with GPA, upcoming assignments, attendance %, wallet balance
- [ ] Grades by subject and term
- [ ] Weekly timetable view
- [ ] Assignment management with submission
- [ ] Attendance calendar
- [ ] eWallet balance and transaction history
- [ ] Report card downloads
- [ ] School announcements
- [ ] Student profile

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All backend functions implemented and tested
- [ ] All frontend pages created and responsive
- [ ] Integration tests passing
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Code review approved

## Files to Create/Modify
`frontend/src/app/(portal)/student/*`

## Testing Requirements
- [ ] Unit tests for all functions
- [ ] Integration tests for workflows
- [ ] E2E tests for critical user journeys
- [ ] Performance tests if applicable

This task is part of Phase 7: Student Panel and must be completed according to the implementation plan specifications.
